Get a website

About LUMIO Coordia Intelligence

We make websites unmistakable.

A clarity-first web studio for service businesses in Malaysia, Hong Kong, and Macau. We don't sell decoration — we build the shortest honest path from "who are you?" to "how do I enquire?"

Our story

Most small-business websites fail quietly. They look fine, cost real money, and generate nothing. We started LUMIO because we kept watching good businesses lose enquiries to pages that never made the next step obvious.

What we believe. A website is a promise about how you do business. If the page is confusing, slow, or vague, that's what a visitor assumes working with you will feel like. Clarity isn't a style — it's the product.

How we work. We shape the message, page journey, pricing path, proof, and contact flow before anything gets built. Strategy first, pixels second. You approve the direction before a single pixel is drawn.

Why it's safe. Every project is refund-backed with clear milestones — cancel before kickoff for a full refund. No lock-in, no surprises, no final payment until you've approved the finished work.

20+
Businesses served
4
Regions
6 mo.
Payback mindset
100%
Refund pre-kickoff

What we stand for

Nothing decorative.
Everything useful.

01

Clarity over cleverness

If a visitor can't repeat your offer in one line after ten seconds, the page has failed — no matter how good it looks.

02

Honesty over hype

We listen first, clarify the goal, and tell you honestly if we're the right fit. No sales pitch, no inflated scope.

03

Proof over promises

Refund-backed milestones, transparent pricing on the page, and no final payment until you've approved the work.

04

Systems over sites

A launch is the start. Lead structure, automation, and follow-up flows keep the site working long after we hand it over.

The team

Two people.
Zero handoffs.

V

VVins

Co-founder · Strategy & Build

Shapes the message, page journey, and build. VVins is the reason every LUMIO page earns its place — and the one who'll cut a section you paid for if it doesn't serve the enquiry.

C

Charles

Co-founder · Clients & Growth

Your first conversation and your ongoing contact. Charles turns what you say over coffee into a scope we can deliver on — and keeps you updated in plain language, not jargon.
